CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ARNOLD EVJE AS COUNSEL. DEF. NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. COURT TAKES JUDI- CIAL NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF TRIAL. PL. WIT, TONY BUM- HALI, S&E. PL. EXH.#1, 3-DAY NOTICE, ID & INTO EVID. JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 440 EDDY ST, #319 - $490.56 RENT & DAMAGES - COSTS PER COST BILL - FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARNOLD, SHEREE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 440 EDDY ST, #319, S.F, CA. $490.56 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.56, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
